name: Company Portal Icons
description: A free, high-quality icon resource collection for Microsoft Intune Company Portal applications. Provides 175+ enterprise-ready icons across 16 categories in PNG format with transparency, plus an Intune Documentation Generator tool.
keywords: how to add app icons intune
author: Morten Glimme

securityCheck.aiSummary: The code is a legitimate Intune/Graph API integration with standard authentication flows. The primary security concern is external telemetry data leakage via the GoatCounter beacon. Other aspects (remote asset fetch for icons, token handling, and beta Graph API usage) are typical for admin tooling but should be monitored for privacy and stability considerations. Consider telemetry opt-in, data minimization, and validating the necessity of Beta API usage.
